about.intro: Hello, welcome! My name is Gabriel and I've been a programmer for about 10 years.
about.journey: Throughout this journey, I've succeeded, I've failed (and I keep failing a lot! lol), I've taught, I've learned, I've been helped and I've helped others too. But above all, I've noticed something special about our profession: we developers are incredibly privileged.
about.privilege: Why? Because unlike many fields out there, we only need a computer and a lot of curiosity to create something amazing. By combining technology with creativity, we can bring ideas to life, solve real problems and make a positive impact on the world around us.
about.blog: This blog is exactly about that: sharing experiences, challenges and learnings about development, technology, and creativity.
